name: Null Mantle
description: Nothing can bear the weight of the Universe.

name: Silence Within
description: A heartbeat in the void, a whisper of life heard in the silence of the cosmos.

name: Footsteps to Nowhere
description: Nothing marks the passage of the wearer except the faint memory of absence, an echo the universe forgets.

name: Grasps of Silence
description: Those that reach beyond what is known often grasp that which they cannot understand.

name: Parallax Greaves
description: Shift between worlds, leave no trace.

name: Jade Sentinel Aura
description: A gentle, atmospheric emerald haze. This shimmer is a visual tribute to the stable, peaceful energy of the universe’s first colonial hubs.

name: Residuum Unbound Aura
description: A crackling violet field that sparks at the edges. It is the visual manifestation of a pioneer whose very presence is beginning to agitate the surrounding matter.

name: Golden Conduit Aura
description: A rhythmic, golden radiance that expands in perfect circles. It is a visual representation of the calm, disciplined influence the wearer exerts on the world around them.

name: Spectral Barrage Aura
description: A cold, blue mist that clings to the ground. It is the "leakage" of an operative who is only 50% present in this dimension.

name: Warped Aura
description: A swirling vortex of magenta and starlight, a rare phenomenon that signals the presence of a being who has transcended the physical plane.

name: Jade Sentinel Ship Aura
description: A soft, trailing wake of mint-green particles. It leaves a visual signature across the stars, marking the passage of a pioneer ship on its mission.

name: Residuum Unbound Ship Aura
description: A violent surge of magenta energy that follows the engines. It is a messy, beautiful trail of "unbound" matter left behind in the ship's wake.

name: Golden Conduit Ship Aura
description: A trail of liquid gold that flows from the engines. It is a clean, prestigious wake that leaves no doubt as to the status of the pilot within.

name: Spectral Barrage Ship Aura
description: A thin, blue energy wake that vibrates the surrounding space. It is the silent calling card of a Spectral Barrage mission.

name: Warped Ship Aura
description: A brilliant, expanding wake of cosmic energy, marking the passage of a machine that has evolved into a fragment of the universe itself.

name: Jade Sentinel Back
description: A heavy, floor-length mantle in pristine mint-green. It was worn by pioneers to signify their rank as guardians of the newborn universe's first outposts.

name: Residuum Unbound Back
description: A tattered, energy-soaked mantle. The edges are no longer clean, appearing frayed by the sheer density of the Residuum it has been dragged through.

name: Golden Conduit Back
description: A pristine, golden-threaded mantle that flows with heavy, liquid-like grace. It is the garment of a commander who serves as a beacon for others to follow.

name: Spectral Barrage Back
description: A semi-transparent shroud of blue energy. It flickers like a dying signal, making the wearer appear as a glitch in the fabric of space.

name: Warped Back
description: A tattered mantle of woven starlight that flows upward against gravity, signifying a rank that exists beyond the standard military hierarchy of the Nexus.

name: Jade Sentinel Hull
description: Coated in the iconic matte-jade finish of the First Watch. This hull style captures the aesthetic of a time when the universe was still a clean slate.

name: Residuum Unbound Hull
description: The hull plating has darkened and pitted. It carries the scorched, violet signature of a ship that has pushed far beyond the mapped boundaries of the First Watch.

name: Golden Conduit Hull
description: Finished in a brilliant, mirror-polished gold. This hull style is a statement of triumph, designed to shine brightly even in the darkest sectors of the Warped Universe.

name: Spectral Barrage Hull
description: A semi-transparent, blue-tinted hull. It gives the ship a "ghostly" appearance, as if the entire vessel has been shifted into a sub-layer of existence.

name: Warped Hull
description: The material has forgotten it was ever solid, rippling with the light of a thousand nebulae; a hull style seen only at the very end of the stars.

name: Jade Sentinel Chest
description: Standard-issue sentinel plating. Its clean, mint-colored finish evokes the era of the early expansion, when every pioneer wore the colors of the preservation effort.

name: Residuum Unbound Chest
description: Once-pristine plating is now mottled and darkened. The Residuum has begun to seep into the alloy, creating a permanent, restless violet patina.

name: Golden Conduit Chest
description: Ornate gold-trimmed plating that serves as a focal point for the wearer. The design is intentional and symmetrical, reflecting a mind that has tamed the chaos.

name: Spectral Barrage Chest
description: Phasing armor plates that reveal the glowing blue core beneath. It represents an operative who has been "untethered" from the solid world.

name: Warped Chest
description: The plating has lost its rigidity, appearing as a shimmering liquid nebula that marks a pioneer who has survived the impossible. It pulses with the heartbeat of creation.

name: Jade Sentinel Echo
description: A suit of mint-hued luminescence. Its steady, soft glow captures the clear-eyed resolve of the First Watch before the universe began to fracture.

name: Residuum Unbound Echo
description: The fibers pulse with an unstable, deep violet energy. Exposure to raw Residuum has saturated the mesh, creating a restless radiance that refuses to be contained.

name: Golden Conduit Echo
description: Radiating a calm, amber glow, this suit represents perfect synchronization between pilot and power. It is the steady heartbeat of the Nexus’s most trusted operators.

name: Spectral Barrage Echo
description: A suit of pure, transparent blue energy. It acts as the anchor for the operative's physical form, glowing with the intensity of a cold sun.

name: Warped Echo
description: Powered by the universe itself, this suit shimmers with shifting magentas—a permanent, rare echo of a soul that has touched the void and been changed.

name: Jade Sentinel Boots
description: Polished footwear with the classic jade trim. These boots are designed to leave the iconic, geometric tread patterns associated with the First Watch’s early territory.

name: Residuum Unbound Boots
description: Every step leaves a faint, static-charged footprint. The boots have been darkened by constant travel through the dense, unformed fields of the deep Nexus.

name: Golden Conduit Boots
description: Gilded footwear that resonates with a low, steady hum. These boots belong to those who walk with purpose, acting as a grounding force in an unstable universe.

name: Spectral Barrage Boots
description: Phasing footwear that makes no sound. They glow with the soft, blue energy of a ghost operative moving through the walls of reality.

name: Warped Boots
description: Footwear that anchors the wearer to reality while leaving behind fading echoes of distant nebulae—the unmistakable footprints of a legend.

name: Jade Sentinel Gloves
description: Formal haptic gauntlets etched with the Jade Sentinel insignia. They are styled after the original gear used during the first foundation-laying ceremonies of the universe.

name: Residuum Unbound Gloves
description: The fingertips hum with an electric magenta glow. These gauntlets bear the marks of a pioneer who has reached out and touched the raw matter of the universe.

name: Golden Conduit Gloves
description: Precision-tooled gauntlets with glowing amber knuckles. They are the mark of a leader whose hands are steady enough to guide the raw matter of creation.

name: Spectral Barrage Gloves
description: Translucent gauntlets that hum with a cold, blue light. They allow the wearer to interact with the universe's matter on a molecular level.

name: Warped Gloves
description: Fingers that trail stardust with every movement, a visual testament to a pioneer who has grasped the raw fabric of the universe and reshaped it.

name: Jade Sentinel Helm
description: The signature helm of the First Watch. Its wide, jade-tinted visor remains a symbol of the pioneers who first looked out into the unmapped silence of the Nexus.

name: Residuum Unbound Helm
description: he visor is now stained with a deep violet hue. It reflects a pioneer who has looked too long into the raw substrate of existence and seen the truth.

name: Golden Conduit Helm
description: A regal helmet featuring a polished amber visor. It signifies a pioneer who no longer just watches the universe, but understands how to direct its flow.

name: Spectral Barrage Helm
description: A crystalline helm with a blue-shifted optics band. It renders the wearer as a glowing, transparent phantom in the eyes of their enemies.

name: Warped Helm
description: A helm that seems to contain a miniature galaxy, worn only by those who have looked past the edge of existence and returned. The visor is a window into the infinite.

name: Jade Sentinel Pants
description: ailored with the rigid lines of a pioneer's dress uniform. This legwear maintains the professional silhouette of those who first patrolled the newborn universe.

name: Residuum Unbound Pants
description: The fabric is heavy and saturated with violet energy. The original uniform lines are beginning to blur as the Residuum works its way through the weave.

name: Golden Conduit Pants
description: Ceremonial-grade legwear with vertical gold filigree. The lines are sharp and disciplined, echoing the stature of a veteran who has mastered the deep void.

name: Spectral Barrage Pants
description: Legwear that appears to be made of solidified light. The silhouette is sharp but partially transparent, mimicking the distortion of a deep-sea mirage.

name: Warped Pants
description: Legwear that ripples like light on water, etched with permanent traces of a journey that few will ever begin and even fewer will finish.

name: Jade Sentinel Mask
description: A decorative faceplate for the ship’s bow. It mimics the stoic, unmoving expression of the Sentinel helmets, giving the vessel a sense of quiet authority.

name: Residuum Unbound Mask
description: The ship’s "face" is now a mask of deep violet. The once-stoic expression has been replaced by a chaotic, shimmering surface that reflects the raw power of creation.

name: Golden Conduit Mask
description: A golden faceplate with a serene, mask-like expression. It project a sense of absolute control and wisdom, marking the ship as a vessel of a master leader.

name: Spectral Barrage Mask
description: A crystalline faceplate that glows from within. It presents a haunting, transparent visage to the universe, marking the ship as a phantom of the Barrage.

name: Warped Mask
description: A shimmering faceplate reflecting the infinite, giving the vessel a god-like presence that commands silence and awe in every sector it enters.

name: Jade Sentinel Sail
description: Translucent mint-colored membranes that catch the light of young stars. These sails are a callback to the elegant, early designs of the pioneer fleet.

name: Residuum Unbound Sail
description: Streaked with vibrant magenta veins, these sails appear to be drinking in the ambient Residuum of deep space, fluttering with an unnatural, internal light.

name: Golden Conduit Sail
description: Radiant amber membranes that shimmer with a steady, internal heat. These sails are masterpieces of engineering, designed to channel power with absolute efficiency.

name: Spectral Barrage Sail
description: Glowing, translucent sails that pulse with a rhythmic blue light. They act as energy siphons, drawing power from the silent parts of the void.

name: Warped Sail
description: Cosmic membranes that appear as liquid windows to other dimensions, reserved for vessels that no longer rely on the laws of physics to travel.

name: Jade Sentinel Tail
description: A sleek, upright guidance fin. It provides the ship with the dignified, balanced silhouette favored by the commanders of the Jade Sentinel expansion.

name: Residuum Unbound Tail
description: A guidance fin darkened by exposure. Its silhouette is sharp and aggressive, reflecting a ship that has adapted to the high-energy turbulence of the deep void.

name: Golden Conduit Tail
description: A majestic, gilded guidance fin. It serves as a visual anchor for the ship, maintaining a noble and commanding silhouette among the stars.

name: Spectral Barrage Tail
description: A phase-shifted guidance fin. It leaves a trail of blue "static" in the air, a visual ghost of where the ship was a second ago.

name: Warped Tail
description: A guidance fin that looks like a frozen explosion of light, leaving a path of fractured reality that serves as a monument to the pilot's journey.

name: Jade Sentinel Tusks
description: Ornate forward-facing prows. These are ceremonial fixtures that give the ship the aggressive, watchful look of a guardian standing at the edge of space.

name: Residuum Unbound Tusks
description: These forward prows are now caked in crystalline Residuum. They give the ship a wild, unpolished look, like a beast that has survived a cosmic storm.

name: Golden Conduit Tusks
description: Polished golden prows that gleam with a focused amber light. No longer just sensors, they are now symbols of authority that lead the way into the unknown.

name: Spectral Barrage Tusks
description: Glowing blue sensors that appear to be made of pure energy. They act as the "eyes" of the ghost fleet, seeing through solid matter.

name: Warped Tusks
description: Ethereal, crystalline projections of the pilot's intent that pierce the veil of space-time, identifying the ship as one of the rarest sights in the galaxy.

name: Jade Sentinel Wings
description: Swept-back stabilizers finished in white and jade. Their geometric form defines the classic "Sentinel" profile that once filled the skies of the inner systems.

name: Residuum Unbound Wings
description: The edges of the stabilizers are jagged and stained. They no longer cut through space cleanly, instead trailing wisps of raw, unformed matter in their wake.

name: Golden Conduit Wings
description: Bold, golden-tipped stabilizers that cut through space with unwavering stability. Their form is a testament to the discipline of the Golden Conduit's high-ranking pilots.

name: Spectral Barrage Wings
description: Sharp, transparent stabilizers that look like carved ice. They cut through the stars with a cold, blue radiance.

name: Warped Wings
description: Stabilizers that shimmer with the iridescent glow of a dying star, vibrating in and out of existence as a hallmark of a master of space-time.

name: Silent Stare
description: Eyes of nothing watch from within.

name: Nexus Pass Season Zero
description: Premium Nexus Pass for Season Zero

name: RGB RNG
description: "Rolled the universe's dice. Won."

name: Nebula Shroud
description: Dense clouds of colour and matter pulling together around a single inevitable point.

name: Nebula Visage
description: Born from the collapse of ancient gas and light. What forms in the dark always burns brightest.

name: Nebula Canopy
description: The Nexus does what the universe once took millennia to manage on its own.

name: Nebula Spires
description: Every stellar nursery leaves a trail of light that takes a thousand years to fade.

name: Nebula Turrets
description: "Stars don't ask permission to shine."

name: Nebula Burners
description: Compressed stellar fire, courtesy of the Nexus. Nature made it first. The Nexus made it faster.

name: War Bag of the Fifth Star
description: "Pack it up, strap it down, carry it till you hit the ground."

name: Knots of the Last Grove
description: "It didn't grow thorns to protect itself. It grew them because it could."

name: Back.exe
Hexcalibur Sigil
description: The mark of a champion isn't given. It's accumulated, mission by mission, until there's no question left.

name: Shade of Psilence
description:
Same stance. Same silhouette. Different everything else. Pick the wrong one and find out.
"Which one am I? Guess."

name: Dark Matter Beacon
description: "Everything orbits something."

name: Nacre Veil
description: The view from the dark side of a planet. Stars so dense they blur into something that stops looking like space and starts looking like art.

name: Red Vs Pack
description:
Red's mission report was thorough, accurate, and filed on time. It mentioned Blue once, in a footnote, generously.
"I even spelled their name right."

name: Enigma Back
description: The mission report filed itself as a routine supply run. Somewhere, someone smiled.

name: Atomic Storm Cradle
description: Every atom contains massive potential energy. The "Cradle" holds all that energy together.

name: Citrine Hull
description: Takes the first hit. Then the second. By the third, they stop aiming for the front.

name: Stellar Bloom Calyx
description:
The cup that holds what's yet to bloom,
protecting light inside the gloom.

name: Raytracer Mesh
description: Millions of polygons resolved into something that shouldn't look this good. It does though.

name: Radiant Velocity Chassis
description: "Every atom remembered where it belonged. Mostly."

name: Flak Shell of the Fifth Star
description: Built to take what the universe throws at you and throw it right back.

name: Bark of the Last Grove
description: Hardened by everything the universe could throw at it. Still standing. Still growing.

name: Chest.exe
Hexcalibur Aegis
description: Every scar earned in the Oracle's name is accounted for. Every one of them mattered.

name: Wall of Psilence
description:
The Void hit it once. Then hit it again. Then reconsidered its life choices.
"There are easier things to break."

name: Dark Matter Cover
description: The universe needed something to hold itself together. This is part of that.

name: Nacre Mantle
description: The shifting colours of a nebula seen from the edge of explored space. Up close it's almost too much to look at. Almost.

name: Red Vs Cuirass
description:
Red arrived early, moved fast, and had already cleared half the facility before noticing the suspiciously blue scorch marks on the walls.
"I assumed it was an environmental hazard."

name: Xenolith Mantle
description: "Hard like mountain."

name: Enigma Cuirass
description: Field worn and unmarked. No insignia, no unit, no name. Just an Echo, alone, and a signal that didn't want to be found.

name: Residuum Personnel Carriers of the Fifth Star
description: "Everywhere and back again."

name: Roots of the Last Grove
description: Claim the ground before you.

name: Feet.exe
Hexcalibur Sabatons
description: Every step taken in service of something bigger than yourself. Every single one counted.

name: Shifters of Psilence
description: Here. Then there.

name: Dark Matter Soles
description: Every step taken where no step should be possible.

name: Nacre Steps
description: The soft luminescence of a bioluminescent shoreline. Beautiful enough to make you forget you're supposed to be somewhere else.

name: Red Vs Babysteps
description:
The extraction was clean, efficient, and entirely Red's doing. Blue was there but that's not really relevant.
"You're welcome, by the way."

name: Xenolith Terrashakers
description: "Step heavy. Ground feel it."

name: Enigma Treads
description:
Seventeen researchers. One facility. Zero guards left standing.
"Leave nothing but questions."

name: Meat Hooks of the Fifth Star
description:
Weapons get handed in at the end of a tour. These don't.
"The first weapon. The last weapon."

name: Thorns of the Last Grove
description: "Try to pull free. See what happens."

name: Gloves.exe
Hexcalibur Gauntlets
description: These hands have turned the tide.

name: Reach of Psilence
description: You don't touch it. You don't need to. The force leaves your hands before your hands have finished deciding.

name: Dark Matter Gauntlets
description: Touches nothing. Holds everything together.

name: Nacre Touch
description: The surface of a calm ocean world, unbroken, reflecting everything above it perfectly.

name: Red Vs Grips
description:
Red came through the east door. The researcher looked up. Red was absolutely the first one through that door.
"I was there first. Objectively. Factually. First."

name: Xenolith Pounders
description: "Smash you."

name: Enigma Wraps
description:
Fingers moving faster than thought, peeling back layer after layer until the coordinates bled through the static.
"Got you."

name: Brain Bucket of the Fifth Star
description:
Keeps the most important thing in the fight alive. Everything else is secondary.
"Head down, eyes up, keep moving."

name: Crown of the Last Grove
description: The grove doesn't give its crown to just anyone.

name: Helm.exe
Hexcalibur Armet
description: Worn by those who see the battlefield differently. Not just what's there, but what's possible.

name: Fade of Psilence
description:
One moment you're there. The next you're everywhere and nowhere at once. The Void can't shoot what it can't see.
"You didn't see me. Nobody ever does."

name: Dark Matter Hood
description: The universe has secrets. This is one of them.

name: Nacre Bloom
description: The light that breaks across a newborn star the moment it first ignites. Captured, somehow, in plating.

name: Red Vs Helm
description:
The mission was straightforward. Rescue a researcher, get out clean. Red was the obvious choice. Red was always the obvious choice.
"I didn't even check if anyone else was assigned. Why would I?"

name: Xenolith Skull
description: "Big skull. Strong skull."

name: Enigma Crown
description:
The mission brief was three words: find them alive. The rest was static, encrypted, and buried six layers deep.
"The code is always in plain sight."

name: Dirtbags of the Fifth Star
description: Every campaign leaves a mark. These have seen every planet worth fighting for and a few that weren't.

name: Undergrowth of the Last Grove
description: Still standing. Still growing.

name: Legs.exe
Hexcalibur Strides
description: The path a champion walks becomes the path others follow.

name: Pulse of Psilence
description: Everything within range stops. Bends. Folds inward toward a single inevitable point.

name: Dark Matter Legguards
description: Some distances aren't measured in steps.

name: Nacre Drift
description: The quiet gradient of a planet's atmosphere at dusk. That precise moment where day can't decide if it's ready to become night.

name: Red Vs Greaves
description:
The facility was quiet. Too quiet. Either Red had already neutralised every threat, or something was wrong. Red chose to believe the former.
"I had it completely under control."

name: Xenolith Outercore
description: "Legs carry far."

name: Enigma Greaves
description:
Three days of dead ends. Then a pattern in the noise. Small. Easy to miss. They wanted it to be missed.
"The answer was always there."

name: Atomic Storm Gnasher
description: "Bite down at the subatomic level."

name: Citrine Bulwark
description: A radiant shield forged from crystallized solar residue.

name: Stellar Bloom Petal
description:
Where nothing soft should dare to grow,
one petal catches starlight's glow.

name: Raytracer Viewport
description:
The view from here is exactly what was meant to be seen.
"Frame perfect."

name: Radiant Velocity Aperture
description: "First through. First to scatter. First to see what comes next."

name: Atomic Storm Rudder
description: The strong nuclear force binds what electromagnetism desperately wants to tear apart.

name: Citrine Coil
description: A spiraling conduit of compressed energy, the Citrine Coil hums with barely-contained luminosity.

name: Stellar Bloom Lash
description:
A trail of beauty left behind,
proof that gentleness can bind.

name: Raytracer Lumen
description: Lighting so advanced it makes the rest of space look flat.

name: Radiant Velocity Wake
description: "You leave pieces of yourself behind. The light carries them forward anyway."

name: Atomic Storm Tusks
description: When you split an atom, two things happen simultaneously: an explosion of light in wavelengths no human eye was meant to perceive, and everything nearby deciding it would very much like to be elsewhere.

name: Citrine Skids
description: 10 points if you run over that gnat!

name: Stellar Bloom Stigma
description:
Reaching outward through the night,
seeking warmth, seeking light.

name: Raytracer Frames
description: "Locked at sixty. Locked on target."

name: Radiant Velocity Blades
description: "Reassembled sharp. Reassembled ready."

name: Atomic Storm Wings
description: Electromagnetic fields containing plasma hot enough to ionise anything within range.

name: Citrine Starnets
description: A lattice of radiant filaments stretched across the ship's frame, the Citrine Starnets shimmer like captured solar winds.

name: Stellar Bloom Thorns
description:
Even flowers learn to fight,
soft petals hiding edges bright.

name: Raytracer Shaders
description: Surface detail so precise you can see light interacting with microscopic imperfections that don't technically exist.

name: Radiant Velocity Slicers
description: "What comes through the portal isn't always what went in."

name: Bubble Pop Prevention Unit
description: Don't stop, don't stop, don't stop the pop!

name: Residua Formation
description: The primary growth point where new crystal structures nucleate and propagate outward.

name: Back_Mercury
description: Every version of yourself that didn't make it brought you here. Wear it for them.

name: Osseous Spine
description: Every structure needs something to hold it together.

name: Xenolith Crust
description: "Weight of world on back."

name: Crimson Phoenix Body
description: Absorbs incoming fire, no matter the intencity.

name: Vessel of Darkness
description: What appears within is only what refuses to be seen in the light.

name: Bubble Wrap
description: "Bouncy castle technology. For combat."

name: Residua Matrix
description: An interlocking lattice of compressed residua crystals.

name: Chest_Mercury
description: Human and Echo. Flesh and energy. Two things that shouldn't combine combining anyway into something neither could have been alone.

name: Osseous Thorax
description: The holes are load bearing. Probably.

name: Grunt's Ghost
description: "Never lost. Never forgotten. Never done."

name: Sap of the Last Grove
description: Still flowing. Still spreading. Still becoming whatever it needs to be next.

name: Electron Discharge
description: Torn from their atomic orbits and sent screaming outward at velocities that make light seem almost patient by comparison.

name: White Hole Singularity
description: Matter expelled at the speed of stop asking questions.

name: Echo.exe
Black Hole Singularity
description: The universe's most efficient garbage disposal.

name: Heart of the Nexus
description: The Oracle's light given form. Carried by those trusted to take it anywhere the universe needs it most.

name: EchoSuit_Mercury
description: Always moving. Always changing. Always more.

name: Echo of Psilence
description: The mind reaches out. The universe echoes back.

name: Sanguine heart
description: Looks like a heart. Beats like a heart. Make of that what you will.

name: Terminus Point
description: Where understanding ends. Where the universe begins again.

name: Can an Echo Blush?
description: That singular moment just before a sunrise breaches the horizon. The universe holding its breath.

name: Heart of the Phoenix
description: What burns at the center burns eternal.

name: Red Vs Echo
description: "I still don't know which one to thank. I've decided on neither." - Researcher

name: Primordial Spirit
description: "Old memory. Not yours."

name: Writ of Eons
description:
Some missions leave a mark on the universe. The light remembers.
"Some codes were never meant to be broken."

name: Pistil Abyss
description:
Where darkness meets the blooming start,
chaos finds its flowering heart.

name: Static Hum
description: Background noise of a million calculations happening simultaneously. Beautiful in its own way.

name: Perfect Dark
description: "The moment between. Where nothing exists except the promise that it will again."

name: Bubble Stompers
description: "Almost like walking on bubblewrap. It's perfect."

name: Residua Foundation
description: A base crystalline structure anchoring the entire formation.

name: Feet_Mercury
description: The step through. The moment between what you were and what you're becoming. It lasts forever. It lasts no time at all.

name: Osseous Soleus
description: The foundation of something that was always going to stand.

name: Bubble Poppers
description: "Weaponized annoyance."

name: Residua Facets
description: Each knuckle a precision-cut edge. Mohs hardness scale stops being relevant past a certain point.

name: Hands_Mercury
description: The first time you reached for something impossible and it reached back.

name: Osseous Knuckles
description: What looks decorative is structural. What looks structural is decorative. Both hit hard.

name: Bubble Brain
description: "Think inside the bubble."

name: Residua Apex
description: A hexagonal crystal structure optimized to refract light at angles that make targeting difficult.

name: Head_Mercury
description: The face you wore before the portal is still there somewhere. You just don't recognise it anymore.

name: Osseous Cranium
description: The structure that protects everything worth protecting.

name: Bubble Bouncers
description: "Boing."

name: Residua Lattice
description: A repeating crystal pattern from hip to ankle.

name: Legs_Mercury
description: Something pulling you forward. Not fear. Not duty. Something deeper than both. You stopped questioning it somewhere around the third portal.

name: Osseous Phalanx
description: Built from the same patterns that hold galaxies together. Just smaller.

name: Crimson Phoenix Beak
description: Emerging from a dense cloud of smoke, the Phoenix seeks it's next target.

name: The Maw
description: All is consumed.

name: Atomic Storm Beacon
description: The cascade starts with one neutron. Then two. Then four.

name: Citrine Spines
description: More than ornamentation, the Citrine Spines act as a way to release excess energy.

name: Crimson Phoenix Plume
description: Proud and loud.

name: Stellar Bloom Style
description:
Growing upward without sight,
trusting suns will bring their light.

name: Raytracer Nanites
description: Millions of triangles rendered as if they were dozens. The math is complicated. The result is simple.

name: Splintered Reality
description: "Nothing is impossible."

name: Radiant Velocity Crest
description: "Scattered across dimensions. Pulled back together. Still flying."

name: Crimson Phoenix Tail
description: As it twists through the nether, it leaves behind a red hot trail.

name: Hollow Spine
description: "Darkness follows it."

name: Crimson Phoenix Talons
description: Never let go of who you were before. The lessons learned still ring true.

name: Absent Foundation
description: Without memories, what would all of this be for?

name: Crimson Phoenix Wings
description: Feathered blades to cut through the void.

name: Fractured Silence
description: Could you sacrifice your humanity to defeat the inhumane?

name: Everlasting Afterburn
description: Even with your eyes closed, it's the last thing you ever see.
